title: Player Changer (Name & Skin)
description: Fakes the player Infront of you Client side to whomever you set it to
body:
# **Custom Player Changer**

This mod allows you to client side change players, like their name & skin.

__________________________________________________

**Showcase:** https://youtu.be/o0oYPMZH388

### Information
**Name Changer**

> When enabled, you can change a players name (only client side). For example, the nearest players name is "Notch", and you toggle the mod on with the selected username "tostraight", their name will change to tostraight, with any other conditions you want (emojis).

**Skin Changer**

> When enabled, you can change a players skin (only client side). For example, the nearest players skin is Notch's skin, and you toggle the mod on with the selected username "tostraight", their skin will change to tostraight!

**Color & Hex Code Customizer**

> The mod allows you to change the color of the selected players username, say you want their name to be a bright red usig the Minecraft "&4" format, you're able to do that! As well as do "&#FF0000", that way if you want a very specific color the mod is able to do it.

**Cover-Ups**
> This mod has advance cover-ups, it changes the players Username in Tablist, their skin in tablist, covers their username and replaces with the set username in chat as well EVEN WHEN YOU /MSG THEM, even works with DisplayNameTags to get around mcpvp.club (or any other server that utizles that form of nametags)! Also covers up their death messages.

**Commands & Config**
> /nameskinchanger <on / off> | /nameskinchangername <username> | /nameskinchangerskin <username>
> You can even save configs using the openable GUI (open with keybind that is changable) and set a keybind for the config you've saved too!
